steps.title: Complete the square
steps.content: Add $1$ to both sides of $x^{2}+2x=72$ so the left becomes a perfect square: $$(x+1)^{2}=73.$$

steps.title: Solve and match
steps.content: Take square roots: $x+1=\pm\sqrt{73}$, so $x=-1\pm\sqrt{73}$. The choice given is $-1+\sqrt{73}$. That matches choice C — C is correct.
